title: Workspace - Sort subitems alphabetically asc/desc on subfolders too
excerpt:
I would like to ask Monday.com Team to implement a new feature that sets on WORKSPACE the subfolders and the subitems alphabetically asc/desc. And not only the parent folders. 
Thank you.

posts.author: GabrielB (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to ask Monday.com Team to implement a new feature that sets on WORKSPACE the subfolders and the subitems alphabetically asc/desc. And not only the parent folders.
Thank you.
